'''鈭歵h-k-y-s''' ('''kathakyesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chant|chant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chant|chant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-k-y-s
|-
! Lemma
| kathakyesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithakyesoko|thithakyesoko]] || [[word:jithakyesoko|jithakyesoko]] || [[word:shithakyesoko|shithakyesoko]] || [[word:kithakyesoko|kithakyesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthakyesoko|thuthuthakyesoko]] || [[word:jujuthakyesoko|jujuthakyesoko]] || [[word:shushuthakyesoko|shushuthakyesoko]] || [[word:kukuthakyesoko|kukuthakyesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthakyesoko|thuthakyesoko]] || [[word:juthakyesoko|juthakyesoko]] || [[word:shuthakyesoko|shuthakyesoko]] || [[word:kuthakyesoko|kuthakyesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthakyesoko|thuthakyesoko]] || [[word:juthakyesoko|juthakyesoko]] || [[word:shuthakyesoko|shuthakyesoko]] || [[word:kuthakyesoko|kuthakyesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethakyesoko|thethakyesoko]] || [[word:jethakyesoko|jethakyesoko]] || [[word:shethakyesoko|shethakyesoko]] || [[word:kethakyesoko|kethakyesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothakyesoko|thothothakyesoko]] || [[word:jojothakyesoko|jojothakyesoko]] || [[word:shoshothakyesoko|shoshothakyesoko]] || [[word:kokothakyesoko|kokothakyesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothakyesoko|thothakyesoko]] || [[word:jothakyesoko|jothakyesoko]] || [[word:shothakyesoko|shothakyesoko]] || [[word:kothakyesoko|kothakyesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothakyesoko|thothakyesoko]] || [[word:jothakyesoko|jothakyesoko]] || [[word:shothakyesoko|shothakyesoko]] || [[word:kothakyesoko|kothakyesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thakyesoko|th忙thakyesoko]] || [[word:j忙thakyesoko|j忙thakyesoko]] || [[word:sh忙thakyesoko|sh忙thakyesoko]] || [[word:k忙thakyesoko|k忙thakyesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathakyesoko|thathathakyesoko]] || [[word:jajathakyesoko|jajathakyesoko]] || [[word:shashathakyesoko|shashathakyesoko]] || [[word:kakathakyesoko|kakathakyesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathakyesoko|thathakyesoko]] || [[word:jathakyesoko|jathakyesoko]] || [[word:shathakyesoko|shathakyesoko]] || [[word:kathakyesoko|kathakyesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathakyesoko|thathakyesoko]] || [[word:jathakyesoko|jathakyesoko]] || [[word:shathakyesoko|shathakyesoko]] || [[word:kathakyesoko|kathakyesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
